name: restack
description: Topic branch integration manager for multi-environment deployment workflows

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n host,ui -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix host" "npm run dev --prefix ui"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix host && npm run build --prefix ui
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix host && npm run typecheck --prefix ui
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix host && npm install --prefix ui
